mapper.select: select id, task_id, user_id, content, parent_id, created_at, updated_at from task_comment where id = #{id} and deleted = 0
select id, task_id, user_id, content, parent_id, created_at, updated_at from task_comment where task_id = #{taskId} and deleted = 0 order by created_at desc
mapper.insert: insert into task_comment (task_id, user_id, content, parent_id, created_at, updated_at) values (#{taskId}, #{userId}, #{content}, #{parentId}, now(), now())
mapper.update: update task_comment set content = #{content}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id} and deleted = 0
update task_comment set deleted = 1 where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select count(*) from task_comment where parent_id = #{parentId} and deleted = 0
